name: Sourdough Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove 1 1/2 cups of the sourdough starter (replenish the rest before returning to the fridge.)
2. In a large bowl, combine water, sugar, salt, and 2 1/2 cups white flour. Mix well.
3. Cover the mixture with a clean cloth and let it stand in a warm place for 12 to 18 hours.
4. Stir down the dough and add butter, whole wheat flour, and enough white flour to make a stiff bread dough.
5. Knead the dough for 10 minutes.
6. Place the dough in a clean, buttered bowl, cover, and let it rise for 2 hours.
7. Punch down the dough and shape it into two round loaves.
8. Place the shaped loaves on an oiled baking sheet, sprinkled with cornmeal.
9. Let the loaves rise for 1 1/2 hours.
10. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius).
11. Bake the bread for 40 to 50 minutes until it sounds hollow when tapped.
